author: PC Gamer
text:
The next World of Darkness game to be revealed is a Werewolf metroidvania, and I respect the hustle
They've led by showing gameplay, let's see how that plays out for them.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Riven co-creator defends his use of AI art: 'Any artist can take a brush and, without thinking, an artist can create slop'
The vinyl soundtrack's release should have been a moment to celebrate, instead it's been marked by controversy.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Stellaris is 10 years old and still getting DLC, which is impressive
We talked to some devs about how the space GSG has maintained such a long orbit.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Stellaris is getting space nomads and scenarios for its 10th birthday
Get ready to live out your Battlestar dreams.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Pearl Abyss marketing director says Crimson Desert's rapid 'live service' patch cadence is business as usual for an MMO studio: 'That is not normal in the industry. That is normal here'
"The DNA of the company is inherent in listening to players."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Fallout co-creator Tim Cain once proposed a first-person time-travel RPG where you could assassinate historical figures and create paradoxes
"One, visit 15 different time periods. Two, meet interesting historical figures. Three, kill them."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Final Fantasy 14 player harnesses the power of furniture slots to make their in-game house look like Pragmata
"Increased placement limit is the best!"

author: PC Gamer
text:
Double Fine is the latest team at Microsoft to unionize
The studio behind Psychonauts and Keeper has filed a petition to the National Labor Relations Board.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Debate: Is turn-based or real-time-with-pause better for CRPGs?
Time to relitigate this contentious subject.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Discussion time: Are classic tab-target MMOs with loads of keybinds going out of style?
I can feel my inner old man weeping, but the times, they are a-changing.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How a trio of Canadian modders stumbled into making an official Die Hard game: 'I've had projects disappear that had 10 times the promise that this did'
The strange origin of MechWarrior steward Piranha Games.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Can you identify 10 games I've turned into pixelated messes?
It's time to find out how low res we can go.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Gaussian Splatting is my new favourite thing, so I hassled an ex-Epic artist to tell me everything he knows about the low-cost 'photo-real' rendering technique
"It is not just a rendering trick—it changes the entire capture-to-delivery pipeline."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Europa Universalis 5's 'biggest update yet' expands the Balkans, overhauls the economy, and fixes more than 2,000 bugs
The Encinades update also reworks orthodoxy and improves military systems.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Abiotic Factor just got another massive update that adds better pets, a ludicrously involved chemistry system, and most importantly, a mop for cleaning up all your failed experiments
Cosmic Companions is live now.

author: PC Gamer
text:
This very normal Half-Life mod lets you play as 'queen of spacetime' Max Caulfield, and it's convinced me that the next Life is Strange should be a full-on boomer shooter
Half-Life is Strange adds rewind powers and teen angst into Valve's FPS.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Conan Exiles whips out a massive Unreal Engine 5 upgrade that includes an 'enhanced endowment slider' to further improve player penises
Biggus Clickus.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The next World of Darkness game to be revealed is a Werewolf metroidvania, and I respect the hustle
They've led by showing gameplay, let's see how that plays out for them.

text:

The vinyl soundtrack's release should have been a moment to celebrate, instead it's been marked by controversy.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Two Point Museum's latest DLC features a buildable studio where artists can create 'millions' of unique artworks, and there's 'no generative AI involved' whatsoever
Two Point Museum: Arty Facts is available now.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Rust's latest update adds mortars but 'no visual guide to help you land shells,' so get ready for some chaos
"Firing a mortar requires mastery through trial & error."
